title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node or browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (previously Ollama-WebUI); import ChatGPT-style UI, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; supports chat, generate, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat and manage models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper with history, syntax highlighting and configurable prompts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for QA, RAG and agent pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: fine-tune, build RAG, deploy on Jetson/Raspberry Pi, function-calling examples.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-made docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama, Open-WebUI, Postgres vector store and RAG.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module providing injectable Ollama service with RxJS streams.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for chatting with Ollama models from mobile or desktop apps.

title: ollama-rag-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds RAG-backed AI assistant powered by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that answers channel mentions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-express-api
summary: Express.js starter exposing OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama for easy drop-in replacement.

title: ollama-kotlin-multiplatform
summary: Kotlin Multiplatform SDK enabling shared code for JVM, Android, iOS and macOS clients.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama HTTP API.
